records.ety: [F. vrit, L. veritas, fr. verus true. See Very.]

defs: The quality or state of being true, or real; consonance of a statement, proposition, or other thing, with fact; truth; reality.
quotes: It is a proposition of eternal verity, that none can govern while he is despised.

defs: That which is true; a true assertion or tenet; a truth; a reality.
quotes: Mark what I say, which you shall find By every syllable a faithful verity.
